name: Oven-Barbecued Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a skillet coated with nonstick cooking spray over medium heat.
2. Brown the chicken on all sides, turning occasionally until golden brown.
3. Transfer the chicken and onion to a greased 11-inch by 7-inch baking dish.
4. In a bowl, mix together chili sauce, tomato sauce, Worcestershire sauce, oregano, and pepper.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken in the baking dish.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes, or until the meat juices run clear.
7. Yield: 2-3 servings.
